label: CU loop • live escalate empty AX → SoM to click a custom-drawn button
notes: Live (model-driven) counterpart to som-escalation-click: every actionable control is SoM-only (minTier: som), so a plain AX capture is EMPTY and the model itself must climb ax→som (Screen Recording is granted in the scripted driver) to see and click Send. No scriptedActions, so this is a real capability discriminator — does the model drive the vision-escalation loop? Tiny-context models SKIP.
